---
title: "modularity_matrix_matvec"
generated: true
description: "Apply the modularity matrix to a stack of vectors."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.graph`](../nitrix-graph.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.graph.community`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:modularity_matrix_matvec -->
```python
modularity_matrix_matvec(A: _GraphInput, x: Num[Array, '... n k'], *, gamma: float = 1.0, normalise: bool = True) -> Num[Array, '... n k']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:modularity_matrix_matvec -->
Apply the modularity matrix to a stack of vectors.

Computes the matrix-vector product

$$
B x = (A - \gamma\, k k^{\top} / 2m)\, x
    = A x - \frac{\gamma}{2m}\, k\,(k^{\top} x)
$$

*without* materialising the rank-1 outer product $k k^{\top}$.
Works for dense, [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd), and
[`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) adjacencies.  This is the
operator that spectral community detection eigendecomposes; passing
it directly to a matrix-free eigensolver (such as `lobpcg`) enables
spectral community detection on million-node graphs.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:modularity_matrix_matvec -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `_GraphInput` | — | — | (Weighted) adjacency, dense or sparse, batched over leading axes. |
| `x` | `Num` | `...` × `n` × `k` | — | Stack of `k` column vectors to which $B$ is applied. |
| `gamma` | `float` | — | `1.0` | Resolution parameter scaling the rank-1 null-model correction. Default `1.0`. |
| `normalise` | `bool` | — | `True` | If `True` (default), divide the result by the total edge weight $2m$. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `n` × `k`. The product $B x$, one column per input column of `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:modularity_matrix_matvec -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
